name: GT-easy
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-bridge-easy (proofs/lem-bridge-easy/, af: validated; status proved). The projected product a•b=P(a o b) on A satisfies the easy axioms: unit law 1•a=a and commutativity a•b=b•a are EXACT; (JB1) ||a•b|| <= (1+C_1 eta)||a|| ||b||; (JB2) ||a•a|| >= (1-C_2 eta)||a||^2; (JB3) a•a >= -C_3 eta ||a||^2 1. Constants C_1,C_2,C_3 universal and dimension-free; proof uses only positivity+unitality of Phi and ||Phi^2-Phi||<=eta (Jordan-Schwarz on Phi), NO complete positivity.
